description_long: This is a modern single bed frame constructed from light-colored wood or wood laminate, featuring a minimalist design with clean, straight lines. The bed includes a high headboard and a lower footboard, both with rounded corners for safety and aesthetics. On one side, there is a large pull-out drawer that spans nearly the full length of the bed, providing ample under-bed storage. The drawer has a recessed handle for easy access and a smooth, flush appearance when closed. The sleeping surface consists of slats, and there is no visible mattress or bedding present. The overall look is functional and space-saving, ideal for urban apartments or compact living spaces.
description: A light wood single bed frame with a high headboard, low footboard, and a large pull-out storage drawer beneath the sleeping surface. The design is minimalist and practical, with no visible mattress or bedding.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the high headboard, side guard, and the large pull-out drawer partially extended.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the full width of the headboard and the bed's length, with the drawer fully removed and placed to the side.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the solid panel construction and the flush alignment of the drawer with the bed frame.
description_view_3: Opposite rear view showing the footboard and the drawer completely separated from the bed.
